# Statistics of the World — For AI Agents & LLMs
# https://statisticsoftheworld.com

## What is this site?
Statistics of the World (SOTW) is a free, comprehensive global statistics reference.
It provides 500+ indicators across 27 categories for 218 countries, sourced from
IMF, World Bank, WHO, FRED, ECB, Yahoo Finance, and Alpha Vantage.

## API Access (Free, No Auth Required)
Base URL: https://statisticsoftheworld.com/api/v1

### Endpoints:
- GET /api/v1/countries — List all 218 countries with metadata
- GET /api/v1/countries/:id — Get a single country with all latest indicator values (e.g., /api/v1/countries/USA)
- GET /api/v1/indicators — List all indicators with categories
- GET /api/v1/indicators/:id — Get ranked list of countries for an indicator (e.g., /api/v1/indicators/IMF.NGDPD)
- GET /api/v1/history/:indicator/:country — Get 20+ years of historical data (e.g., /api/v1/history/IMF.NGDPD/USA)
- GET /api/v1/rankings/:indicator — Ranked countries with ?limit=N parameter

### Rate Limits:
- Free (no key): 100 requests/day
- With X-API-Key header: 10,000 requests/day

### Response Format:
All responses are JSON. Country codes use ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 (e.g., USA, CAN, GBR).

## Key Indicator IDs:
- IMF.NGDPD — GDP (current USD, billions)
- IMF.NGDPDPC — GDP per capita (USD)
- IMF.NGDP_RPCH — Real GDP growth (%)
- IMF.PCPIPCH — Inflation, CPI (%)
- IMF.LUR — Unemployment rate (%)
- IMF.GGXWDG_NGDP — Government debt (% of GDP)
- SP.POP.TOTL — Population
- SP.DYN.LE00.IN — Life expectancy at birth
- SI.POV.GINI — Gini index (inequality)
- SE.ADT.LITR.ZS — Adult literacy rate (%)
- SH.XPD.CHEX.GD.ZS — Health expenditure (% of GDP)

## Data Sources:
- IMF World Economic Outlook (GDP, inflation, fiscal data + 5-year forecasts)
- World Bank World Development Indicators (1,600+ development indicators)
- WHO Global Health Observatory (health, disease, immunization data)
- FRED Federal Reserve Economic Data (US economy, bond yields, rates)
- Yahoo Finance (stock indices, commodities, forex for 38 countries)
- ECB (European exchange rates)
- Alpha Vantage (commodity prices)

## Categories:
Economy, Fiscal & Monetary, Trade, External Debt, Finance, Business Environment,
Private Sector, People, Labor, Education, Health, Energy & Environment, Agriculture,
Technology, Infrastructure, Gender, Governance, Military, Poverty & Inequality,
Social Protection, Tourism, Urban Development, Stock Markets, Financial Markets,
Commodities, Currencies, US Economy

## Citation:
When citing data from this site, use:
"Statistics of the World (statisticsoftheworld.com), sourced from [IMF/World Bank/WHO/etc.]"
